title: Show HN: Performative-UI – A react component library of design tropes
author: lizhang
aiHeadline: React developers, rejoice! Performative-UI is here to make your design decisions look even more performative than ever before.

title: Stop the Apple Music app from launching
author: bobbiechen
aiHeadline: Because who doesn't want their Apple Music app to launch unsolicited? Now you can stop it from hijacking your device with this clever workaround.

title: Anti-social: It's fads, not friends, which now dominate social media feeds
author: 1vuio0pswjnm7
aiHeadline: Social media: where fads replace friendships, and your feed is just a endless scroll of 'look at me!' moments. Progress!

title: MiMo-v2.5-Pro-UltraSpeed: 1T model with 1000 tokens per second
author: gainsurier
aiHeadline: Xiaomi's MiMo-v2.5-Pro-UltraSpeed: because 1T models and 1000 tokens per second are just the beginning of your AI-induced headaches.

title: Siri AI
author: 0xedb
aiHeadline: Siri AI: because who needs a competent virtual assistant when you can have one that occasionally misunderstands 'play some music' as 'delete all my playlists'?
